code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)
mut i = 0
mut token = ""
mut max_v = 0
mut min_v = 0
mut started = false

while i < n
  let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    -1
  end
  let is_ws = b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13 or b == 11 or b == 12
  if is_ws
    if string.len(token) > 0
      match string.parse_int(token)
      when Some(v)
        if not started
          max_v = v
          min_v = v
          started = true
        else
          if v > max_v
            max_v = v
          end
          if v < min_v
            min_v = v
          end
        end
      when None
        ()
      end
      token = ""
    end
  else
    token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if string.len(token) > 0
  match string.parse_int(token)
  when Some(v)
    if not started
      max_v = v
      min_v = v
      started = true
    else
      if v > max_v
        max_v = v
      end
      if v < min_v
        min_v = v
      end
    end
  when None
    ()
  end
end

println("max=#{max_v}")
println("min=#{min_v}")
